description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find the cheapest available .com domain containing the word “greenbike” that costs under $15 per year and add a 1‑year registration to your cart.
tasks.name: Find the cheapest available .com domain containing the word “greenbike” that costs under $15 per year and add a 1‑year registration to your cart.
tasks.description: Find the cheapest available .com domain containing the word “greenbike” that costs under $15 per year and add a 1‑year registration to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Compare the 3‑year registration prices with privacy enabled for a domain name that is available in both .com and .io, then add the cheaper extension to your cart.
tasks.name: Compare the 3‑year registration prices with privacy enabled for a domain name that is available in both .com and .io, then add the cheaper extension to your cart.
tasks.description: Compare the 3‑year registration prices with privacy enabled for a domain name that is available in both .com and .io, then add the cheaper extension to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Open any featured premium domain and, based on whether its listed one‑time price is above or below $1,000, either place an offer or buy it immediately and proceed with that option.
tasks.name: Open any featured premium domain and, based on whether its listed one‑time price is above or below $1,000, either place an offer or buy it immediately and proceed with that option.
tasks.description: Open any featured premium domain and, based on whether its listed one‑time price is above or below $1,000, either place an offer or buy it immediately and proceed with that option.

tasks.instruction: On a premium domain’s page, select an installment payment plan whose monthly cost is under $50 and term is no longer than 24 months, then continue to checkout with that plan selected.
tasks.name: On a premium domain’s page, select an installment payment plan whose monthly cost is under $50 and term is no longer than 24 months, then continue to checkout with that plan selected.
tasks.description: On a premium domain’s page, select an installment payment plan whose monthly cost is under $50 and term is no longer than 24 months, then continue to checkout with that plan selected.

tasks.instruction: Add two different domains with 1‑year terms whose combined regular price exceeds $100, then apply a valid promo code at checkout so that the total discount is at least $10.
tasks.name: Add two different domains with 1‑year terms whose combined regular price exceeds $100, then apply a valid promo code at checkout so that the total discount is at least $10.
tasks.description: Add two different domains with 1‑year terms whose combined regular price exceeds $100, then apply a valid promo code at checkout so that the total discount is at least $10.

tasks.instruction: Using bulk search for five domains at once, add the three cheapest available .com or .net results priced under $12 per year to your cart with 1‑year terms.
tasks.name: Using bulk search for five domains at once, add the three cheapest available .com or .net results priced under $12 per year to your cart with 1‑year terms.
tasks.description: Using bulk search for five domains at once, add the three cheapest available .com or .net results priced under $12 per year to your cart with 1‑year terms.

tasks.instruction: Initiate a transfer for an existing .com domain that is not available for new registration but supports transfer, keep a 1‑year extension, explicitly disable privacy protection, and add the transfer to your cart after providing the required authorization code.
tasks.name: Initiate a transfer for an existing .com domain that is not available for new registration but supports transfer, keep a 1‑year extension, explicitly disable privacy protection, and add the transfer to your cart after providing the required authorization code.
tasks.description: Initiate a transfer for an existing .com domain that is not available for new registration but supports transfer, keep a 1‑year extension, explicitly disable privacy protection, and add the transfer to your cart after providing the required authorization code.

tasks.instruction: From a premium domain’s suggested alternatives, find the cheapest domain priced between $50 and $150 whose name before the extension is at most 12 characters long, set its registration to 2 years, and add it to your cart.
tasks.name: From a premium domain’s suggested alternatives, find the cheapest domain priced between $50 and $150 whose name before the extension is at most 12 characters long, set its registration to 2 years, and add it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Find a brokered domain whose price is only available on request, then complete and submit the price inquiry form with your name, email, a budget of about $1,500, a short purchase message, and with all marketing opt‑in boxes left unchecked.

expected_values.name: Alex Carter
expected_values.message: I am interested in purchasing this domain. Please let me know your best price within my budget.
